channel.title: morningNewsSection1
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from morningNewsSection1, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bobby Cox, Hall of Fame manager of Atlanta Braves, dies at age 84
item.description: The Braves announced Cox's death on Saturday. He managed the team to prominence during the 1990s and the team's only championship in 1995, before reti...

item.title: An expert on Iranian politics reviews the status of negotiations to end the war on Iran
item.description: NPR's Elissa Nadworny talks to Mehrzad Boroujerdi of the Missouri University of Science and Technology about the status of the Trump Administration's ...

item.title: CDC says threat of widespread outbreak of hantavirus remains low
item.description: As hantavirus has dominated headlines, sparking fears of another debilitating pandemic, the CDC stressed that the risk of sweeping contagion was small...

item.title: Frontier Airlines plane strikes and kills pedestrian
item.description: Denver International Airport said the person had jumped a fence and dashed into the aircraft's path minutes before being struck.
